---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
editor: visual
---

I teach several courses at the undergraduate and graduate level. Please contact me for more information on any of these courses

-   Elections and Participation (undergraduate)

-   Psychology and Politics (undergraduate)

-   Data Science for Political Science (undergraduate)

    -   Sample [course notes](https://katherinetmccabe.com/dsps25/)

-   Maximum Likelihood Estimation (doctoral)

    -   Sample [course notes](https://katherinetmccabe.com/mle23)

-   Experimental Methods (doctoral)

-   Political Psychology (doctoral)

I have also helped organize and instruct during the Rutgers Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science, held from 2020-2022, 2024, and 2026. If you would like to help organize or provide a guest talk at [SICSS-Rutgers](https://sicss.io/2026/rutgers/) in a future year, please contact me.
